ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_CAPTURE.title: Soul Capture
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_CAPTURE.description: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. [gold]Fatal[/gold]: Permanently remove this from your deck and add one extra copy of the target's exclusive card to combat rewards.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_CAPTURE_TEST.title: Test
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_ARCHITECT.title: The Architect
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_ASSASSIN_RUBY_RAI: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterAssassinRubyRaiderStealthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stealth[/gold] (the next time you are attacked, reduce damage by 100%). Your next Attack card deals [blue]{SoulMonsterAssassinRubyRaiderAmbushPower}[/blue]x damage.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_AXEBOT.title: Axebot
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_AXE_RUBY_RAIDER.d: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. If the target is below [blue]50%[/blue] HP, deal double damage instead and gain [blue]3[/blue] Energy.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BIG_DUMMY.title: Big Dummy
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BOWLBUG_EGG.title: Bowlbug (Egg)
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BRUTE_RUBY_RAIDER: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. For each [gold]Status[/gold] card in your hand, increase this damage by [blue]{CalculationExtra}[/blue]. If this attack deals damage, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BYGONE_EFFIGY.des: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterBygoneEffigyDiscardPower}[/blue] [gold]Ancient Burden[/gold] (at the start of your next turn, discard [blue]1[/blue] card).

ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BYRDPIP.title: Byrdpip
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_CHOMPER.title: Chomper
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_COCOON.title: Cocoon
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_CORPSE_SLUG.title: Corpse Slug
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_CORPSE_SLUG.descr: Deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage. NL [gold]Fatal[/gold]: Permanently gain [blue]{MaxHp:diff()}[/blue] Max HP, and this card's damage permanently increases by [blue]{Increase:diff()}[/blue] this run.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_CROSSBOW_RUBY_RAI: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage [blue]{Times}[/blue] times. Trigger [blue]1[/blue] additional hit for each other enemy. Each time this card is played this combat, permanently increase its base damage by [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_CRUSHER.title: Crusher
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_DOOR.title: Door
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_DOORMAKER.title: Doormaker
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_ENTOMANCER.title: Entomancer
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_ENTOMANCER.descri: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterEntomancerPower}[/blue] [gold]Insect Counterplay[/gold] (whenever you are attacked, apply that much [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies; every [blue]3[/blue] attacks taken, all enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_EXOSKELETON.title: Exoskeleton
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_EYE_WITH_TEETH.de: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. If the target has Block, ignore Block, then gain Block equal to damage dealt.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FABRICATOR.title: Fabricator
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FAT_GREMLIN.title: Fat Gremlin
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FLYCONID.title: Flyconid
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FLYCONID.descript: Apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy, gain [blue]{SoulMonsterFlyconidPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. If you have not played an Attack this turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FOGMOG.title: Fogmog
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FOGMOG.descriptio: Whenever you play a Skill card, apply [blue]{SoulMonsterFogmogPower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FOSSIL_STALKER.de: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterFossilStalkerPower}[/blue] [gold]Suck[/gold] (whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FROG_KNIGHT.title: Frog Knight
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_FUZZY_WURM_CRAWLE: Gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. At the start of your next turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Burrow Raid+|Burrow Raid}[/gold] to your hand (deal {IfUpgraded:show:16|12} damage and draw 1 card).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_GAS_BOMB.title: Gas Bomb
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_GAS_BOMB.descript: At the end of [blue]{Turns:diff()}[/blue] turn, deal [blue]{BombDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage to all enemies.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_GAZING_MOTH.title: Gazing Moth

ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_HATCHLING.title: Hatchling
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_HATCHLING.descrip: [gold]Osty[/gold] deals damage equal to its current HP.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_HUNTER_KILLER.des: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterHunterKillerPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Predation Rhythm[/gold] (whenever you play a card this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold]).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_INFESTED_PRISM.de: Gain [blue]{LethalityPower:diff()}[/blue]% [gold]Lethality[/gold] (your first Attack each turn deals bonus damage), and make your first [blue]{SoulMonsterInfestedPrismPower:diff()}[/blue] Attack each turn cost 0.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_INKLET.title: Inklet
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BURROW_RAID.title: Burrow Raid
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_BURROW_RAID.descr: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy. Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_KIN_PRIEST.title: Kin Priest
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_LAGAVULIN_MATRIAR: Gain [blue]{PlatingPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plated Armor[/gold]. Gain [gold]The Bomb[/gold]: in [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, take [blue]{BombDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_LEAF_SLIME_M.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. NL Each time this is played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_LEAF_SLIME_S.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. NL Each time this is played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_LIVING_FOG.title: Living Fog
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_LIVING_FOG.descri: At the start of your turn, add a random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]upgraded[/gold]} Skill to your [gold]hand[/gold].
Whenever you play a card this turn, gain [blue]{Power:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_MAGI_KNIGHT.title: Magi Knight
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_MAWLER.title: Mawler
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_MAWLER.descriptio: Deal [blue]{CalculatedDamage}[/blue] damage. Each time you take damage this combat, this card gains [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] damage (up to [blue]{MaxBonus}[/blue]). [gold]Fatal[/gold]: Permanently gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_MYTE.title: Myte
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_MYTE.description: Apply [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold]. Gain [blue]{NoxiousFumesPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Noxious Fumes[/gold] (at the start of your turn, apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to all enemies).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_NIBBIT.title: Nibbit
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_NOISEBOT.title: Noisebot
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_OSTY.title: Osty
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_OVICOPTER.title: Ovicopter
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_OVICOPTER.descrip: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterOvicopterPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Aerial Brood[/gold] (at the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] that amount and command [gold]Osty[/gold] to deal damage equal to its current HP to all enemies).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_PARAFRIGHT.title: Parafright
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_PARAFRIGHT.descri: [gold]Osty[/gold] deals [blue]{CalculatedDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage. This card deals damage equal to [blue]{ExtraDamage:diff()}[/blue]x [gold]Osty[/gold]'s current HP.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_PHANTASMAL_GARDEN: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterPhantasmalGardenerPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Phantasmal Armor[/gold] (the first time you take damage each turn, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold]).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_PHROG_PARASITE.de: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the target. For every [blue]{BlockThreshold}[/blue] Block removed this way, apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].

ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SEWER_CLAM.descri: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SLUDGE_SPINNER.de: [gold]Retain[/gold]. NL Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. NL At the end of your turn, if this card is retained in your hand, apply [blue]{Poison:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold] to all enemies, and permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]{Increase:diff()}[/blue] this combat.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SOUL_FYSH.title: Soul Fysh
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SOUL_FYSH.descrip: Gain [blue]{IntangiblePower}[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold]. Apply [blue]{DemisePower}[/blue] [gold]Demise[/gold] to all enemies (at the end of their turn, lose that much HP).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SOUL_NEXUS.title: Soul Nexus
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SPINY_TOAD.title: Spiny Toad
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_SPINY_TOAD.descri: Gain [blue]{ThornsPower}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold]. If your [gold]Thorns[/gold] is above [blue]10[/blue], lose all [gold]Thorns[/gold] and deal damage to the target equal to [blue]{Multiplier}[/blue]x that amount.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_STABBOT.title: Stabbot
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TERROR_EEL.title: Terror Eel
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TERROR_EEL.descri: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterTerrorEelPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Terror Prep[/gold] (at the start of your turn, gain that much [gold]Vigor[/gold] and [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]).

ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_THE_OBSCURA.descr: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterTheObscuraPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Illusion Pulse[/gold] (at the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Summon}[/blue]).
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_THIEVING_HOPPER.d: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Add a random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]upgraded[/gold]} Monster Soul card to your [gold]hand[/gold]. It can be played for free this turn.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TOADPOLE.title: Toadpole
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TOUGH_EGG.title: Tough Egg
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TRACKER_RUBY_RAID: If the target has no [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. If the target has [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage [blue]{Times}[/blue] times. [gold]Upgrade[/gold]: Do both in order: apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], then deal the hits.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TUNNELER.title: Tunneler
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_TUNNELER.descript: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. If you have [gold]Block[/gold], deal [blue]{BlockDamage}[/blue] damage instead.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_VANTOM.title: Vantom
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_VINE_SHAMBLER.des: Gain [gold]Vine Surge[/gold]. This turn, your Attack cards cost [blue]1[/blue] less Energy.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_WATERFALL_GIANT.d: Gain [blue]{SoulMonsterWaterfallPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Waterfall[/gold] and refresh [gold]Waterfall Countdown[/gold]. In 2 turns, deal [blue]Waterfall points + Waterfall points²÷20 (rounded down)[/blue] damage to all enemies.
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_WRIGGLER.title: Wriggler
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_MONSTER_WRIGGLER.descript: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the target. For every [blue]{BlockThreshold}[/blue] Block removed this way, apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
